verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Overwhelm me, overwhelm me with Your love, mercy and grace Overtake me overtake my heart and mind exceed my imagination :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More than we could ever ask or think Overflow, overflow, overflow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You’re my Lord forever, my God my El Shaddai You’re my Lord forever, you will supply, you will supply, you will supply, El Shaddai

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than we could ever ask or think More than we could ever ask or think More than we could ever ask or think Overflow, overflow, overflow
